Risk Description: Because of repeated defect reopenings and increased QA retesting cycles, there is a risk that test cycles will extend, which could lead to financial loss and delayed delivery.
Because of recurring environment dependencies and PR approval delays, there is a risk that timelines will slip, which could lead to SLA breach and delayed go-live.
Because developer utilization reached 82%, there is a risk that resource fatigue will impact code quality and velocity, which could lead to increased defects and delivery slippage.
